LanguageData.VFEFactory_AssembleBattleDrone.label: Assemble battle drone
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AssembleBattleDrone.descripti: Automatically assemble a battle drone from steel and components.

LanguageData.VFEFactory_AssembleRaiderDrone.label: Assemble raider drone
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AssembleRaiderDrone.descripti: Automatically assemble a raider drone from steel, components and a drone core.
